news.t: GraniteShares 2x Long LCID Daily ETF (LCDL) and GraniteShares 2x Long RIVN Daily ETF (RVNL) Launch Today.

overview.description: The GraniteShares 2x Long LCID Daily ETF (LCDL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Lucid Group stock. LCDL was launched on Apr 21, 2025 and is issued by GraniteShares.

data.title: GraniteShares 2x Long LCID Daily ETF (LCDL) and GraniteShares 2x Long RIVN Daily ETF (RVNL) Launch Today.
data.text: NEW YORK, April 22, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- GraniteShares, a provider of exchange traded funds (ETFs), today announced the launch of two new leveraged single-stock ETFs: GraniteShares 2x Long LCID Da...
